title: orchestration-state
description: Durable JSON state contract for /prp-orchestrate. Persisted as JSON (not markdown) because models overwrite markdown but respect structured JSON (KB: Harness Patterns F03). The mediator is the single writer; specialists read it. Written to <repo>/.claude/orchestration-state.json in the coordinating checkout.

preset.description: Active preset name binding generic roles to repos/stacks (e.g. 'seathq'), or 'none' for generic single-repo mode.

baseBranch.description: Detected base branch that every specialist worktree forks from.

capability.description: Capability preflight result (U-1/U-2). Drives parallel-vs-serial fallback.

agentTeamsEnabled.description: Whether env CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1 is set (confirmed enable key, official docs).

teamToolsAvailable.description: Whether SendMessage + natural-language teammate spawn are exposed in this build.

mode.description: parallel = worktree-per-specialist fan-out; serial = one-writer-at-a-time worktree fallback.

contract.description: Granular, testable 'done' criteria negotiated on disk BEFORE any code is written (KB: Harness Patterns F05). Each maps to ≥1 AC of the goal.

gate.description: Executable predicate (shell command) that proves the criterion — never an adjective.

acRef.description: Which goal AC this criterion serves.

specialists.description: Active specialists (mediator enforces 2-5, never all 7 — KB: Agent Teams P04/X04).

boundRepo.description: Repo/path the preset binds this role to (e.g. 'seathq-fe'), or 'self' for single-repo.

worktree.description: Absolute path of THIS specialist's git worktree — distinct per active specialist (AC-4).

territory.description: Glob patterns this specialist exclusively owns. MUST be pairwise-disjoint with every other active specialist's territory (AC-4 invariant).

recipients.description: Named message recipients (KB: Agent Teams P03 — name recipients explicitly). e.g. frontend -> [qa-analyst, ux-specialist].

rounds.description: One entry per mediator round; each carries the per-specialist verdicts graded against the target repo's .claude/ rules.

verdict.description: ✅ on-track / ⚠️ drift-risk / 🔴 drifting. 🔴 (MUST or MUST-NOT violation, or drift-guard 3+ fails) BLOCKS this specialist's merge.

actionableCriteria.description: On a failing verdict, the concrete fix criteria returned to the specialist (KB: adversarial evaluator returns a rubric, not vibes).

mergeLog.description: Serial merge record — worktrees merged one at a time, passing verdicts only (AC-4).

territoryDisjoint.description: AC-4 invariant assertion: true iff every pair of active specialists' territory globs is disjoint. The mediator MUST abort allocation (Phase B) if this is false.

humanGates.description: The only points the run stopped for a human (AC-1): requirement fork or red blast-radius (auth/payments/deploy/db-migration).
